# [Lending stack] KFS

Owner: Saksham Srivastava

# **What problem are we solving?**

Scope of the problem:

1. Content of the KFS should be user friendly and make the user understand key terms and construct of the product.
2. How will RE share the values which will enable LSP to render the KFS
3. How will LSP render the KFS (design)
4. How will LSP capture consent from the customer?
5. How will LSP share consent with the RE?
6. How will RE store this consent?

---

# **How do we measure success?**

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

1. Content of the KFS
2. Implementation of KFS on Volt LSP
    1. UI/UX
    2. Acknowledgement log creation and storage

## User stories / User flow

1. If a user has accepted the KFS, the same terms of the KFS should be honoured for 3 days. This should be honoured even if we change terms/charges in KFS. 
2. If a user has accepted the KFS on 29th September 2024, the loan maturity date in KFS will be 30th September 2027. Now if the user signs the agreement on 1st October, the loan maturity date in agreement will be 31st October 2027. This is as expected. Honouring the KFS logic will not be implemented here.

# **Appendix**

## Meeting notes

Pending items:

- [ ]  Closure on term for sanction limit and collateral linked credit limit
- [ ]  Closure on tenure of loan to be 36 months or more. In case of end date to be rounded up at the end of 36 months.
- [ ]  Stamp duty should be shown separately or not?
- [ ]  Principal due charges
    - [ ]  Get the KFS from Nishant
- [x]  Cooling of period policy
- [ ]  Grievance policy alignment
- [ ]  Lender and LSP grievance officer alignemnet
- [ ]  Recovery agent policy - Will LSP act as recovery agent or not
- [x]  APR calculation signoff

1. https://vinodkothari.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Webinar-on-KFS-and-APR-New-Rules-by-RBI-on-Retail-MSME-Lending.pdf
